summary: Najeela 5C is a tuned high-power Bracket 4 deck. Fast mana, instant-speed tutors, and a combat-focused win loop allow it to threaten lethal as early as turn 4 without committing the whole hand. Multiple Game Changers and chained extra turns keep it firmly out of Bracket 3.

bracket.label: Optimized
bracket.headline: Bracket 4 (Optimized) — high band
bracket.tagline: High-power non-cEDH. Fast mana plus chained extra turns plus tutors.

restrictions.label: Game Changers
restrictions.detail: Bracket 4 permits any number of Game Changers. The deck runs 5 detected GCs.

restrictions.label: Mass land denial
restrictions.detail: No Armageddon, Cataclysm, Winter Orb, etc. detected in the decklist.

restrictions.label: Extra turns
restrictions.detail: Najeela's activated ability creates chained extra combats; not extra turns by Wizards' definition but operationally similar.

restrictions.label: Two-card combo
restrictions.detail: Najeela + any free combat enabler can chain into lethal in one turn cycle.

evidence: Najeela commander shell with chained combats

power.rationale: Wins through prepared interaction with tutored answers and a fast combat win.

speed.rationale: Fast mana plus tutors compress goldfish time to turn 4 reliably.

interaction.rationale: Free counterspells and instant removal protect the combo turn.

consistency.rationale: Black tutor suite finds Najeela's combat enablers reliably.

salt.rationale: Chained combats and a single-turn kill produce a long solo turn.

social_friction.rationale: Pod needs alignment on combo timing and chained-combat etiquette.

friction_drivers.label: Single-turn combo finish
friction_drivers.explanation: Najeela activations cascade into a one-turn lethal once Cryptolith Rite or similar is resolved.

rule_zero_talking_points.prompt: Najeela can win in one big turn after a free-combat enabler. Agree on whether that closing speed fits the pod.
Five Game Changers; pod should know that going in.

recommendations.title: Disclose combo enabler turn
recommendations.detail: Lead Rule 0 by naming Cryptolith Rite / Druids' Repository as the combat enabler.

recommendations.title: Add a second wipe answer
recommendations.detail: A second instant-speed wipe answer (e.g. Veil of Summer) would tighten resilience.
